messages.content: 哪条latex指令可以自动生成目录

# LaTeX 生成目录的指令

在 LaTeX 中，生成目录的指令是：

```latex
\tableofcontents
```

## 完整示例

```latex
\documentclass{article}

\begin{document}

\tableofcontents  % 生成目录

\section{第一章}
这是第一章的内容。

\subsection{第一节}
这是第一节的内容。

\section{第二章}
这是第二章的内容。

\end{document}
```

## 重要提示

1. **需要编译两次**：第一次收集章节信息，第二次生成目录
2. 目录会自动包含 `\section`、`\subsection`、`\subsubsection` 等章节标题
3. 使用 `\section*{}` 带星号的命令不会出现在目录中

## 相关指令

- `\listoffigures` - 生成图目录
- `\listoftables` - 生成表目录

这就是 LaTeX 中最常用的自动生成目录的方法！

\newpage
\appendix
\onecolumn
\section*{Appendix Overview}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{Appendix}
{\large  % 或使用 \Large
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,topsep=6pt,itemsep=10pt]
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DynamicQuotaforToolInvocation}}: Dynamic Quota for Tool Invocation
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:OverturnMaskingGRPO}}: Over-turn Masking GRPO
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DetailsofDatasetConstruction}}: Details of Dataset Construction
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Task Type Definition
        \item[\textbullet] Dataset Statistics
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:AdditionalImplementationDetails}}: Additional Implementation Details
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Training Details
        \item[\textbullet] Evaluation Details
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:AdditionalAblations}}: Additional Ablations
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Different Attention Mask Ratio
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Verifiable Trajectory-Guided Reward
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Training Stage
        \item[\textbullet] Efficiency Analysis
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:Prompt_Template}}: Prompt Template
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:QualitativeAnalysis}}: Qualitative Analysis
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:FailureCaseAnalysis}}: Failure Case Analysis
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:LimitationsandFutureWork}}: Limitations and Future Work
\end{itemize}
}
\vspace{1em}
  
修改我的latex代码，尽量贴近上面的样式
For each metric, we \textbf{bold} the best result. 以下所有表格相同
好的，这里是所有表格添
For each metric, we \textbf{bold} the best result. 以下所有表格相同 帮我翻译成英文

这里是翻译：

**简洁版（推荐）：**
```latex
For each metric, we \textbf{bold} the best result across all methods.
```

**或者更完整的版本：**
```latex
For all tables below, we \textbf{bold} the best result for each metric.
```

**其他表达方式：**

1. **强调"在所有方法中"：**
```latex
In all following tables, we \textbf{bold} the highest score for each metric.
```

2. **更学术的表达：**
```latex
Throughout all tables, the best-performing result for each metric is \textbf{bolded}.
```

3. **简短版本：**
```latex
Best results are \textbf{bolded} in all tables.
```

**我的建议：**

如果要在文中统一说明所有后续表格的格式规则，可以这样写：

```latex
\textit{Note: For all tables in this paper, we \textbf{bold} the best result for each metric.}
```

或者在每个表格的 caption 中单独说明：

```latex
\caption{
    \textbf{[Your table title].}
    Best results are \textbf{bolded} for each metric.
}
```

**最推荐用于你的场景：**
```latex
For each metric, we \textbf{bold} the best result across all methods.
```

这个表达既简洁又清晰，适合放在 caption 中！

The results are presented in Table~\ref{tab:app:InferenceTime}. VideoSeeker achieves an average inference time of 10.2 seconds, representing a significant speedup compared to the decoupled baselines, LOVE-R1 (15.2 seconds) and VideoChat-R1.5 (18.9 seconds).
  
加上相比于其他两个模型推理时间降低百分比的叙述

这里是添加百分比降低叙述的修改版本：

**版本1（推荐 - 简洁明了）：**
```latex
The results are presented in Table~\ref{tab:app:InferenceTime}. VideoSeeker achieves an average inference time of 10.2 seconds, representing a significant speedup compared to the decoupled baselines, LOVE-R1 (15.2 seconds) and VideoChat-R1.5 (18.9 seconds), corresponding to a 32.9\% and 46.0\% reduction in inference time, respectively.
```

**版本2（更详细）：**
```latex
The results are presented in Table~\ref{tab:app:InferenceTime}. VideoSeeker achieves an average inference time of 10.2 seconds, representing a significant speedup compared to the decoupled baselines. Specifically, VideoSeeker reduces inference time by 32.9\% relative to LOVE-R1 (15.2 seconds) and by 46.0\% relative to VideoChat-R1.5 (18.9 seconds).
```

**版本3（强调效率提升）：**
```latex
The results are presented in Table~\ref{tab:app:InferenceTime}. VideoSeeker achieves an average inference time of 10.2 seconds, yielding substantial efficiency gains over the decoupled baselines: 32.9\% faster than LOVE-R1 (15.2 seconds) and 46.0\% faster than VideoChat-R1.5 (18.9 seconds).
```

**版本4（更学术的表达）：**
```latex
The results are presented in Table~\ref{tab:app:InferenceTime}. VideoSeeker achieves an average inference time of 10.2 seconds, representing a significant speedup compared to the decoupled baselines, LOVE-R1 (15.2 seconds) and VideoChat-R1.5 (18.9 seconds). This translates to inference time reductions of 32.9\% and 46.0\%, respectively.
```

**计算说明：**
- vs LOVE-R1: (15.2 - 10.2) / 15.2 × 100% = 32.9%
- vs VideoChat-R1.5: (18.9 - 10.2) / 18.9 × 100% = 46.0%

**我最推荐版本1**，因为它：
- ✅ 保持了原句的流畅性
- ✅ 清晰展示了具体的效率提升
- ✅ 使用 "respectively" 明确对应关系
- ✅ 符合学术论文的表达习惯
